results.note: xterm.js onData -> PTY write -> ConPTY flow confirmed in useTerminal.ts (onData handler) and TerminalPanel.tsx handleTermData (line 327) calling pty.handle.current.write(data)
invoke('plugin:pty|read') confirmed in ptyProcess.ts read loop, but actual line is 93, not 88. Line 88 is the start of the readLoop function.
writeBytes debounce-batched with 4ms/50ms confirmed in useTerminal.ts:242-258. Background tabs buffer in bgBufferRef, flushed as single merged write on tab focus in TerminalPanel.tsx:479-488.
Zustand store drives tab state dots, status bar, subagent cards via useSessionStore confirmed throughout App.tsx and TerminalPanel.tsx.
xterm.js 6.0 with DEC 2026 synchronized output confirmed in useTerminal.ts comment at line 27-29: 'xterm.js 6 handles DEC 2026 synchronized output natively'.
WebGL renderer with context loss recovery confirmed in useTerminal.ts:156-175. loadWebgl(canRetry=true) disposes on context loss, retries after 1s, falls back to canvas if retry fails.
Visibility change handler confirmed in TerminalPanel.tsx:505-519. Calls clearTextureAtlas() and refresh() on visibilitychange event when document becomes visible.
Icons.tsx exports 24 inline SVG icon components confirmed by grep count. All are stroke-based (shared Icon base), 16x16 viewBox, currentColor, pointerEvents none. File starts at line 1.
groupSessionsByDir at paths.ts:49 and swapWithinGroup at paths.ts:64 confirmed. Map-based, O(n) single pass, insertion-order groups. TabGroup type exported at line 41.
Sole source is BUN_INSPECT WebSocket via JSON.stringify interception confirmed in useInspectorState.ts comment at line 79 and inspectorHooks.ts doc comment at line 1-11.
1s connect delay (CONNECT_DELAY_MS=1000) at useInspectorState.ts:24, 3 retries (MAX_RETRIES=3) at line 29, backoff delays [2000,4000,8000] at line 31 confirmed.
deriveStateFromPoll() pure function at useInspectorState.ts:37 confirmed. Takes poll data and current state, returns derived state.
permPending notification flag at inspectorHooks.ts:76 confirmed. Sets state.permPending=true when notification_type==='permission_prompt'.

idleDetected notification flag at inspectorHooks.ts:77 confirmed. Sticky, cleared only by user event at line 236. No __ispPush in current code but behavior matches: idleDetected is set on notification_type==='idle_prompt' and persists until user event.

choiceHint computation confirmed in POLL_STATE at inspectorHooks.ts:374 (not 315). Uses last 200 chars text check with numbered list + question mark. Auto-clear on user input at line 233 (stop set to null). useInspectorState.ts:69 confirmed.
Tool actions (toolAction), user prompts (userPrompt), assistant text (lastText), subagent descriptions (pendingDescs) all captured inline in the JSON.stringify hook in inspectorHooks.ts.
No timer-based state inference found. State derived purely from inspector poll results and notification flags.
Subagent descriptions, state, tokens, actions, and messages all captured via inspector hook agentId routing in inspectorHooks.ts:86-158.
JSONL utilities kept for session_has_conversation and list_past_sessions confirmed in lib.rs generate_handler (lines 106-107). No JSONL-based state detection.

_sealed flag confirmed: initialized false at inspectorHooks.ts:53, guards stop_reason writes at line 181, set true on result at line 211, cleared on user event at line 235. Tokens/model still accumulate while sealed (lines 176-179 are outside _sealed guard).
idleDetected cleared only by user events at inspectorHooks.ts:236 confirmed. Prevents state oscillation.

Override chain confirmed at useInspectorState.ts:37-74: ExitPlanMode refines toolUse to actionNeeded (line 63), idleDetected overrides to idle (line 66), choiceHint refines idle to actionNeeded (line 69), permPending always wins (line 72).

INSTALL_HOOK wrapping JSON.stringify confirmed at inspectorHooks.ts:27. Poll every 250ms via POLL_STATE confirmed at useInspectorState.ts:198-200 (not 203). Events drained each cycle (inspectorHooks.ts:385).

InspectorPollResult confirmed at useInspectorState.ts:7 (correct). POLL_STATE result fields confirmed at inspectorHooks.ts:355-383. Documented line 296 for POLL_STATE start is actually at 352 (the POLL_STATE export starts at line 352).

WebFetch domain blocklist bypass confirmed at inspectorHooks.ts:298-341. Intercepts require('https').request, returns can_fetch:true for api.anthropic.com/api/web/domain_info. fetchBypassed counter exposed in poll state at line 379.

Interrupt signal detection (Ctrl+C \x03 and Escape \x1b) confirmed at inspectorHooks.ts:272. Pushes synthetic result event, sets stop to end_turn, clears permission/tool flags, marks all subagents idle (lines 272-285).
Direct PTY wrapper calling invoke('plugin:pty|...') confirmed at ptyProcess.ts:1 (module docstring) and throughout the file.

env defaults to {} (not omitted) in spawnPty at ptyProcess.ts:61. The doc says 'omit env to inherit' but the code passes env: options.env ?? {}. However, the CLI env is passed separately via BUN_INSPECT env var in TerminalPanel.tsx:388, so the behavior is correct for PTY layer. The Rust pty plugin merges env with inherited env.
CLAUDECODE env var removed in lib.rs:22: std::env::remove_var('CLAUDECODE') confirmed.
exitFired guard at ptyProcess.ts:78,82-83 ensures exitCallback fires exactly once, whether from kill or natural exit.
Tab action button focus suppression is a CSS concern. Verified the buttons exist in the terminal button bar.
Fixed 100K scrollback confirmed at useTerminal.ts:42: scrollback: 100000.

activePids Set at ptyProcess.ts:9, registerActivePid at line 11. Rust ActivePids at lib.rs:16. Dual-layer: frontend killAllActivePtys on beforeunload (App.tsx:151), Rust RunEvent::Exit handler at lib.rs:115-123.
overflow-y:scroll with scrollbar-width:none confirmed at TerminalPanel.css:59-66. isAtBottom uses BOTTOM_TOLERANCE=2 at useTerminal.ts:9, used in isAtBottom at line 303 and wasAtBottom at line 214.
FitAddon dimension guard at useTerminal.ts:312 (fit() wrapper checks proposeDimensions), line 178-181 (initial attach), line 184-189 (ResizeObserver). All check rows>1 before calling fit.
Parallel exit waiter confirmed at ptyProcess.ts:114-119 (not 112). fire-and-forget invoke('plugin:pty|exitstatus') alongside read loop, exitFired guard ensures one callback.
Respawn clears bgBufferRef and clearPending() at TerminalPanel.tsx:306-307. clearPending at useTerminal.ts:366-373 confirmed.
Pre-spawn fit() at TerminalPanel.tsx:382, post-spawn rAF dimension verification at TerminalPanel.tsx:396-402 confirmed.
Frontend-owned persistence via persist_sessions_json confirmed. Rust session manager does not own persistence.
beforeunload event calls persist() confirmed at App.tsx:150-156.
Debounced auto-persist every 2s confirmed at App.tsx:141-146: setTimeout(() => persist(), 2000) in useEffect on sessions changes.
beforeunload calls killAllActivePtys() before persist() at App.tsx:151. killAllActivePtys at ptyProcess.ts:22 confirmed.
init() uses Promise.all for kill_orphan_sessions and detect_claude_cli in parallel at sessions.ts:86-95. claudePath set only after both complete (line 96-98).
triggerRespawn at TerminalPanel.tsx:283-324 cleans up old PTY/watchers/inspector, allocates new inspector port (line 319), increments respawn counter (line 323).
Resume target chain handled via getResumeId (imported from claude.ts). resumeSession || sessionId || id chain confirmed in session config handling.
Conversation existence checked via nodeSummary (in metadata from inspector) || resumeSession, implemented in canResumeSession from claude.ts.
One-shot flags confirmed in DeadOverlay: New session button creates freshConfig with resumeSession: null, continueSession: false, sessionId: null at TerminalPanel.tsx:76-79.
Confirmed in build_claude_args Rust command logic: --session-id skipped when --resume or --continue is used.
Session-in-use auto-recovery confirmed at TerminalPanel.tsx:242-266. Calls kill_session_holder to check ancestry, kills own descendants, distinguishes external holders.

Spawn effect guards against dead sessions at TerminalPanel.tsx:376: 'if (spawnedRef.current || !claudePath || session.state === "dead") return'. triggerRespawn sets state to 'starting' at line 322 before incrementing counter.

Auto-resume effect at TerminalPanel.tsx:420-428 uses prevVisibleRef to detect hidden-to-visible transitions. Only fires when tab becomes visible AND session is dead AND conversation is resumable. 150ms delay at line 426.
Terminal reset on respawn writes \x1bc (RIS) at TerminalPanel.tsx:308, then fit() at line 309.
Session switch detection via sid field change confirmed at useInspectorState.ts:179-182.
Same Bun process, same WebSocket connection confirmed â€” inspector hook persists across session ID changes within the same process.
No JSONL file scanning for session switch â€” all via inspector WebSocket confirmed.
Inspector port allocation and registry in inspectorPort.ts confirmed. allocateInspectorPort, registerInspectorPort, getInspectorPort all present.
INSTALL_HOOK at inspectorHooks.ts:27 confirmed. Wraps JSON.stringify, captures events into globalThis.__inspectorState. Polled every 250ms via POLL_STATE.
Subagent tracking via Agent tool_use -> queues description in pendingDescs -> new session ID event creates sub entry confirmed in inspectorHooks.ts:86-106.
Subagent conversation messages captured via POLL_STATE splice confirmed at inspectorHooks.ts:381 (not 317). Messages drained in useInspectorState.ts:155-157 (sub.msgs mapping, not at line 120).
Stale subagent detection removed confirmed. useInspectorState.ts:149 area contains clearIdleSubagents call for new-sub cleanup, not stale detection.
Dead subagent purge removed confirmed. Idle subs remain visible. useInspectorState.ts:149 area handles only active sub updates.
Random start offset at inspectorPort.ts:9 confirmed: nextPort = PORT_MIN + (Date.now() % (PORT_MAX - PORT_MIN + 1)).

MessageBlock with useState for collapse at SubagentInspector.tsx:18-19 (not 12 â€” getToolPreview helper at 12). getToolPreview extracts first non-empty line, 120 char cap at line 15. lastToolIndex via reduce at line 79. Last tool auto-expands when active at line 100. React key={i} confirmed.
Background tab buffering in bgBufferRef confirmed. Flushed as single batched write on tab focus at TerminalPanel.tsx:479-488.
visibleRef tracks tab visibility at TerminalPanel.tsx:205-207. Used in handlePtyData at line 225 for buffering decisions.
create_session and close_session confirmed in lib.rs generate_handler at lines 64-65.
build_claude_args confirmed in lib.rs generate_handler at line 77.
start_jsonl_watcher and stop_jsonl_watcher confirmed in lib.rs generate_handler at lines 107-108.
find_continuation_session confirmed in lib.rs generate_handler at line 105.
detect_claude_cli, check_cli_version, get_cli_help confirmed in lib.rs generate_handler at lines 76, 83, 84.
list_past_sessions confirmed in lib.rs generate_handler at line 82.
get_first_user_message confirmed in lib.rs generate_handler at line 87.
persist_sessions_json and load_persisted_sessions confirmed in lib.rs generate_handler at lines 74-75.
discover_builtin_commands and discover_plugin_commands confirmed in lib.rs generate_handler at lines 78, 81.
discover_hooks and save_hooks confirmed in lib.rs generate_handler at lines 88-89.

register_active_pid at commands.rs:1364. RunEvent::Exit handler at lib.rs:176-183 iterates ActivePids and calls kill_process_tree_sync. lib.rs:115 manages ActivePids state. Doc line refs updated to 1370/176.

read_config_file at commands.rs:1758. write_config_file at commands.rs:1769. list_agents at 1799. Agent paths confirmed: user=~/.claude/agents/ (line 1740), project={wd}/.claude/agents/ (line 1741), local={wd}/.claude/local/agents/ (line 1742). Parent dirs auto-created on write (line 1782). Doc line refs updated.

kill_orphan_sessions at commands.rs:1637. Takes Vec<String> session IDs, WMIC on Windows (line 1658), pgrep on Unix (line 1693). kills all without ancestry check. Returns count. sessions.ts:90 invocation confirmed. Doc line refs updated.

send_notification at commands.rs:1836. Uses tauri_winrt_notification Toast with on_activated callback emitting notification-clicked event. Dev mode PowerShell app ID at line 1849, production bundle identifier at line 1851. spawn_blocking at line 1842. Doc line refs updated.
CSS grid auto 1fr auto at ConfigManager.css:18 confirmed. ConfigManager.tsx:66 renders the config-header div.
formatScopePath at paths.ts:89 confirmed. Normalizes backslashes to forward slashes, abbreviates project paths via abbreviatePath(). User-scope paths pass through at line 92.

4-tier priority confirmed: (1) JSON Schema from schemastore at commands.rs:650 via fetch_settings_schema; (2) CLI --help; (3) Binary Zod regex scan via discover_settings_schema; (4) Static field registry at settingsSchema.ts:56-60. settings.ts:233 loadBinarySettingsSchema confirmed.
lastPtyDimsRef tracks {cols, rows} at TerminalPanel.tsx:358. handleResize compares current dims to last, returns early if unchanged (line 361). Reset to null on respawn (line 319).
Background reader thread at lib.rs:119 confirmed. OS thread reads ConPTY pipe (8 KiB buffer, line 122) into bounded sync_channel(64) at line 119. Decouples blocking pipe reads from IPC read command.

commands.rs:407 search_session_content async+spawn_blocking. 20MB max (MAX_CONTENT_SEARCH_FILE_SIZE), 50 results cap (MAX_CONTENT_SEARCH_RESULTS). extract_message_text filters user/assistant events. 200-char snippet. lib.rs:137 registered.

choiceHint detection uses terminal buffer tail at useInspectorState.ts:126-130. getSessionBufferTail(sid,15) checks '> 1.' and '2.' pattern. terminalRegistry.ts:30 exports getSessionBufferTail. useTerminal.ts:349 defines getBufferTail. Doc line refs updated.

DEC 2026 sync coalescing confirmed. read command at lib.rs:179 filters through OutputFilter then SyncBlockDetector. Mid-sync-block 50ms timeout coalescing at lib.rs:210-234. sync_detector.rs:1 confirmed with BSU/ESU detection.

OutputFilter at output_filter.rs:1-31 strips OSC 52, OSC 50, DCS, C1 controls (PendingC2 state at line 48), ESC[3J. ESC[2J stripped outside sync blocks after startup grace period of 2 (startup_clears_remaining:2 at line 63). Device queries pass through. OSC 2 titles sanitized. Hyperlinks pass through.
drain_output at lib.rs:340 confirmed. 500ms deadline, 10ms recv_timeout intervals. ptyProcess.ts:170 calls invoke('plugin:pty|drain_output') during kill sequence.

strip_clear_screen_into at lib.rs:27 uses memchr::memmem to remove ESC[2J. emit_sync_block at lib.rs:40 re-wraps with BSU/ESU, replaces ESC[2J with ESC[H ESC[J for full-redraw blocks (is_full_redraw flag). Doc line refs 25 and 40 are accurate (25=doc comment, 40=emit_sync_block).
drain_output at pty-patch lib.rs:340 confirmed. spawn_blocking wrapper, 500ms deadline, empties channel with 10ms recv_timeout intervals.

read_claude_binary at commands.rs:624. 5-step chain confirmed: (1) .cmd shim parse for JS paths (line 643), (2) direct CLI path read (line 663), (3) sibling node_modules (line 672), (4) legacy versions dir (line 684), (5) npm root -g (line 702). Doc line ref updated.

Plugin commands at commands.rs:1879-1909 (refactored to use run_claude_cli helper at line 538). plugin_list (--available --json), plugin_install (--scope), plugin_uninstall, plugin_enable, plugin_disable. All async+spawn_blocking via helper. CREATE_NO_WINDOW via run_claude_cli. Raw JSON passthrough for list, string for mutations. lib.rs:167-171 registered.

WebFetch timeout protection confirmed. (1) globalThis.fetch wrapper at inspectorHooks.ts:357-369: 120s timeout for non-streaming Anthropic API calls, checks for 'stream':true to distinguish. Wires caller's AbortSignal. (2) https.request hard timeout at inspectorHooks.ts:340-348: 90s wall clock via setTimeout+req.destroy. Counters fetchTimeouts and httpsTimeouts exposed in poll state.
